instruction: Map every app, package, and server route to one product surface: operator web, marketplace, splash, shared sync engine, or shared package.
constraints: Do not move files; report only.

instruction: Find imports that cross product boundaries and classify each as allowed shared infrastructure or forbidden coupling.
constraints: Do not allow apps/marketplace to import operator SDK or src internals.

instruction: Verify apps/web uses only the operator SDK for operator HTTP calls and does not call marketplace-only APIs.
constraints: No raw fetch additions; prefer generated SDK wrappers.

instruction: Verify apps/marketplace uses only the marketplace SDK and local files.
constraints: No @auto-dealer/api-client, apps/web, src/server, src/services, or Prisma imports.

instruction: Verify apps/splash has no backend, auth, Prisma, OpenAPI, or product-app imports.
constraints: Splash should be static marketing UI only.

instruction: Identify files whose names or exports still imply auto-only ownership but actually serve generic channel operations.
constraints: Do not rename without separate approval.

instruction: Check whether shared packages have clean public exports and no hidden app-specific imports.
constraints: Shared packages must not import apps/*.

instruction: Create a route ownership table for operator, marketplace, public-write, auth, and dev-only routes.
constraints: Compare with OpenAPI classification.

instruction: Find duplicated boundary check logic and propose a single root verify command structure.
constraints: Preserve existing scripts until replacement is tested.

instruction: Audit every visible string in reusable operator shell components for hardcoded vehicle, dealer, VIN, stock number, listing site, or car language.
constraints: Do not flag vehicle-specific detail panels.

instruction: Validate that each registered business category resolves through the category schema registry without crashing.
expected_output: Resolution test plan and missing categories.
constraints: Vehicles remain the first polished active mode.

instruction: Verify businessCategory is loaded from the active organization/dealership and not from the user account.
constraints: One category per organization for v1.

instruction: Check that category schema IDs, slugs, copy files, and route slugs use one consistent naming convention.
constraints: Do not silently alias ambiguous slugs.

instruction: Identify reusable components that should receive category labels as props or context instead of importing automotive copy directly.
constraints: Prefer CategoryProvider over prop drilling when page-wide.

instruction: Verify placeholder categories render generic Asset/Channel language and never show broken TODOs on production-facing pages.
constraints: TODOs can appear only in internal index/dev views.

instruction: Check whether category fields, readiness rules, lifecycle labels, and performance metrics are bundled into a coherent schema object.
constraints: Start simple; avoid generic Asset DB rewrite.

instruction: Map every operator page to the category schema fields it should consume.
constraints: Do not implement pages; research only.

instruction: Propose a fallback behavior for unknown or disabled business categories.
constraints: Fallback must be safe and obvious, not silently wrong.

instruction: Evaluate whether category-specific API shapes are truly needed or if generic reuse plus category field payloads is enough.
constraints: First choice is clean generic reuse.

instruction: Audit all Fastify routes against operator and marketplace OpenAPI specs for missing paths, schemas, security, and operationIds.
constraints: Do not merge marketplace spec into operator spec.

instruction: Find frontend API calls that bypass generated SDK wrappers.
expected_output: Raw fetch inventory and migration plan.
constraints: Import/upload exceptions allowed if documented.

instruction: Verify operator auth uses op_session only in operator spec and marketplace auth uses mp_session only in marketplace spec.
constraints: No cross-cookie security schemes.

instruction: Compare generated SDK response types with UI local types and identify redundant hand-written types.
constraints: Do not delete types used for UI shaping without replacement.

instruction: Check all public-write endpoints for documented validation errors and rate-limit responses.
constraints: Include 429 and validation response shapes.

instruction: Verify every route has x-route-classification and the route contract test covers it.
constraints: Auth routes must have their own class.

instruction: Find stale schemas in OpenAPI that are no longer referenced by any operation.
constraints: Do not remove without validating client impact.

instruction: Evaluate whether shared schema fragments should be duplicated or intentionally separated across operator and marketplace specs.
constraints: Favor explicit separation when privacy boundary matters.

instruction: Find database fields that are marketplace-safe on detail pages but not list pages, and verify select projections enforce that distinction.
constraints: VIN allowed only where intentionally documented.

instruction: Audit Prisma queries exposed to marketplace routes for explicit select usage.
constraints: No include of raw operator relations.

instruction: Audit operator queries for tenant scoping through requireDealerAccess or equivalent.
constraints: Production routes must not rely on DEV_OPERATOR_DEALER_IDS.

instruction: Identify Vehicle-specific fields leaking into generic service names or shared component types.
constraints: Keep Vehicle table for v1; do not create generic Asset yet.

instruction: Review additive migrations for default values, nullability, and existing data safety.
constraints: No destructive migrations for pilot.

instruction: Check auth session tables for raw token storage, expiration behavior, and revocation coverage.
constraints: Only tokenHash should be stored.

instruction: Check favorites data model for listingId-only storage and no VIN/operator field persistence.
constraints: Favorites may preserve rows for delisted items.

instruction: Identify heavy aggregate jobs that could be moved from request path to scheduled job.
constraints: GET routes should read cache only.

instruction: Verify operator routes require op_session in production and dev header only works in development/test.
constraints: No production x-operator-id fallback.

instruction: Verify marketplace routes ignore op_session and marketplace auth routes require mp_session where appropriate.
constraints: Operator and marketplace sessions are not interchangeable.

instruction: Audit cookie attributes for op_session and mp_session.
constraints: HttpOnly, SameSite=Strict, proper Path, Secure in production.

instruction: Check login endpoints for email/password oracle leaks and consistent 401 messages.
constraints: Unknown email and wrong password should look identical.

instruction: Audit public-write rate limits for endpoint coverage, bucket keys, retry headers, and single-instance limitation docs.
constraints: Do not add Redis unless separately scoped.

instruction: Check all dev-only routes and demo feed endpoints are gated out in production.
constraints: No /dev route in production.

instruction: Verify proof/export artifacts avoid PII, credentials, raw contact messages, and marketplace-private leaks.
constraints: Aggregates are acceptable; raw PII is not.

instruction: Review error responses for sensitive stack traces or database details.
constraints: Production errors should be concise.

instruction: Trace the full path from inventory source ingest to platform impact and identify duplicate or legacy branches.
constraints: Preserve CSV, JSON ingest, and API source paths.

instruction: Verify every dispatch goes through dispatchAdapter and no direct mock/live dispatch remains.
constraints: Non-MOCK paths must be gated.

instruction: Check scheduler claim, retry, cooldown, and lastDispatchedAt behavior for race-safety and idempotency.
constraints: Do not change semantics without tests.

instruction: Audit queue status labels for generic shell language vs category labels.
constraints: Visible text should come from category schema.

instruction: Find old prepare/publish paths that duplicate newer ingress auto-reconcile behavior.
constraints: Do not remove operator escape hatches without approval.

instruction: Verify API source polling respects pollIntervalMinutes and never fetches paused/disconnected sources.
constraints: Manual Check Now may override schedule only by design.

instruction: Check ingest failure modes for partial commits, audit event consistency, and reconcile scheduling behavior.
constraints: Partial imports must not look fully successful.

instruction: Evaluate which publish actions are generic channel operations and which belong to vehicle readiness rules.
constraints: Vehicle-specific logic should live in automotive mode.

instruction: Audit performance UI/API language for attribution creep: sold by, caused by, ROI, conversion claims.
constraints: Use observed assist, movement signal, confidence.

instruction: Verify GET performance routes read cache only and POST compute is explicit.
constraints: No hidden heavy compute on GET.

instruction: Check comparable benchmark rules are centralized and not duplicated in UI.
constraints: Same make/model, year ±3, price ±5%.

instruction: Verify channel events are measurement records, not workflow records.
constraints: No CRM pipeline or salesperson task behavior.

instruction: Audit platform comparison views for confidence labels and low-data visibility.
constraints: Do not hide insufficient data.

instruction: Check marketplace stats endpoints expose only marketplace-safe aggregate counts.
constraints: No raw buyer PII or operator internals.

instruction: Identify performance metrics that should become category-specific config values.
constraints: Avoid changing compute jobs until a second category is active.

instruction: Audit apps/web reusable shell components for category-hardcoded nouns and recommend category schema replacements.
constraints: Leave vehicle-specific panels alone.

instruction: Audit apps/marketplace for operator SDK imports, token storage, and unsafe vehicle fields in list/favorites.
constraints: No localStorage tokens; mp_session is HttpOnly.

instruction: Identify duplicate loading, empty, and error state components across apps/web and apps/marketplace.
constraints: Do not merge product-specific shells.

instruction: Review auth bootstrap flows for redirect loops, stale user state, and 401 handling.
constraints: Operator and marketplace auth flows remain separate.

instruction: Check favorites optimistic updates for rollback behavior and stale backend omissions.
constraints: Unavailable favorites are omitted by API.

instruction: Review platform-first pages plan for shared list controls, row cards, filters, and category copy inputs.
constraints: No implementation unless separately scoped.

instruction: Audit splash app for shared shell quality, category-driven content, and no backend coupling.
constraints: CTA form remains local-only until endpoint is scoped.

instruction: Find dead scripts, stale route files, unused generated type wrappers, and old proof-of-concept files.
constraints: Classify risk before deletion.

instruction: Find duplicate helper functions for dates, relative times, price formatting, mileage formatting, and status labels.
constraints: Prefer package-level helpers when truly shared.

instruction: Audit docs for stale platform counts, outdated auth limitations, and incorrect route descriptions.
constraints: Update docs only after code is verified.

instruction: Find any TODO or placeholder comments in production paths and classify as acceptable, misleading, or blocker.
constraints: Do not remove context without replacement.

instruction: Review package.json scripts for overlapping verify/build/test commands and propose a minimal command matrix.
constraints: Keep current commands until replacements are validated.

instruction: Find tests that assert implementation details rather than public contracts and propose safer contract tests.
constraints: Do not weaken boundary tests.

instruction: Search for any auto-dealer-specific package names in generic packages or splash surfaces.
constraints: Rename only with migration plan.

instruction: Build a sequence diagram for operator login, dealer selection, category schema loading, and first data fetch.
constraints: Do not change runtime behavior.

instruction: Build a sequence diagram for marketplace login, favorites load, favorite toggle, and stale favorite omission.
constraints: mp_session only; no operator auth.

instruction: Find places where Promise.all could isolate independent panel errors instead of failing a whole page.
constraints: Do not hide critical status failures.

instruction: Find request paths that perform writes and side effects after response success without audit coverage.
constraints: Recommend event logging where missing.

instruction: Review debounce/timer based flows for reconcile or impact write-back and identify race risks.
constraints: Preserve current behavior; report first.

instruction: Find repeated try/catch patterns that can become shared result helpers.
constraints: Avoid generic wrappers that obscure business errors.

instruction: Inventory all boundary tests and identify untested product-boundary paths.
constraints: Do not weaken existing tests.

instruction: Find tests that should be added when businessCategory changes from automotive to a placeholder.
constraints: Placeholder categories must not crash.

instruction: Audit smoke test coverage against production-readiness exit criteria.
constraints: Keep smoke fast and deterministic.

instruction: Identify tests that require DB state and propose fixture isolation improvements.
constraints: Do not add slow global setup unless needed.

instruction: Review generated SDK usage in tests and suggest contract-focused assertions.
constraints: Avoid testing generated code internals.

instruction: Create a one-page command map for install, dev, build, verify, seed, and smoke across all three apps.
constraints: No script changes unless separately approved.

instruction: Audit README and handoff docs for onboarding gaps after adding apps/splash and category schemas.
constraints: Keep docs concise.

instruction: Find scripts whose names still imply auto-only scope but now run cross-product checks.
constraints: Avoid churn unless names mislead.

instruction: Propose a minimal local demo path that exercises operator, marketplace, and splash without extra services.
constraints: No backend changes.

instruction: Validate apps/splash content loader falls back safely for every registered category slug.
constraints: No backend requests.

instruction: Audit splash copy files for category-driven brand, audience, asset, channel, and CTA fields.
constraints: Vehicles copy can be richer than placeholders.

instruction: Check splash build output for large assets, unnecessary dependencies, and slow marketing-page load risks.
constraints: No stock-photo dependency unless intentional.
